overview: This contract demonstrates how the generation fabric can render diagrams, code samples, and structured notes from a schema and JSON payload.

sections.title: Pipeline
sections.summary: The contract is still deterministic: schema validates JSON, then Markdown is rendered from the structured payload.
sections.diagram:
graph LR
  S[Schema] --> J[JSON]
  J --> M[Markdown]
  M --> D[Docs]
notes: The diagram is emitted as a mermaid fence.
The JSON object is emitted as a fenced JSON block.

sections.title: Migration
sections.summary: Legacy Markdown can be imported, but the contract keeps the generator honest for new material.
sections.diagram:
graph LR
  L[Legacy Markdown] --> I[Importer]
  I --> C[Contract]
  C --> R[Render]
notes: The importer can bootstrap a contract from existing docs.
The registry keeps the new kind discoverable.
